name: Jiaxin (Jerry) Qian
title: Senior Backend Engineer
summary: Senior Backend Engineer with 8+ years of experience building high-throughput, compliance-critical backend systems in regulated financial environments. Deep expertise in Java, distributed systems design, and event-driven architectures. Strong focus on software quality, pragmatic engineering trade-offs, and system reliability at scale. Experienced mentor and collaborator with a track record of shipping clean, well-tested backend services that balance delivery speed with long-term maintainability.

experience.title: Senior Backend Engineer (Contract)
experience.context: Regulatory filings platform: ~15-25 microservices, 50k-100k transactions/day, Kafka event-driven workflows, PostgreSQL persistence
bullets: Designed and delivered Java Spring Boot backend services powering high-volume regulatory transaction processing across 15-25 microservices, handling 50k-100k transactions per day with strict consistency, auditability, and zero-loss guarantees.
Architected idempotent, retry-safe REST APIs and distributed transaction workflows ensuring correct state management and financial data integrity under concurrent load and failure conditions.

Built Kafka event-driven pipelines for real-time financial data ingestion with robust retry logic, dead-letter handling, and failure-domain isolation enabling reliable downstream consumption across integrated services.
Reduced API latency by 30% through systematic SQL query optimisation and backend service refactoring, applying pragmatic performance trade-offs for high-frequency financial workloads.
Led legacy modernisation efforts, refactoring aging service components into clean, testable Spring Boot microservices while maintaining backward compatibility for dependent consumers.
Established observability infrastructure (Splunk/Prometheus): structured logging, dashboards, and alerting enabling proactive reliability management and fast production incident resolution.
Conducted rigorous code reviews and mentored engineers on distributed systems design, testing strategies, and engineering best practices.
Collaborated with product owners and compliance stakeholders to translate regulatory requirements into production-ready backend solutions delivered on schedule.

experience.title: Backend Engineer
bullets: Built Java Spring Boot microservices and REST APIs supporting transactional business workflows and secure cross-system integrations.
Optimised SQL queries and relational database interactions, improving throughput for data-intensive operational processes.
Automated deployment pipelines reducing manual release effort by ~60%, improving deployment consistency and rollback reliability.
Mentored engineers on testing practices, CI/CD standards, and backend code quality.

experience.title: Java Software Engineer
bullets: Developed high-throughput transactional backend APIs (Java + RabbitMQ) handling concurrent reservation processing with strong consistency guarantees.
Implemented distributed validation logic preventing duplicate transactions and data corruption under high concurrency.

experience.title: Java Backend Developer
bullets: Built enterprise Java/Spring MVC backend services for regulated insurance policy management platforms.
Grew automated test coverage from 15% to 75% (JUnit), establishing quality culture and significantly reducing production defects.
Performed SQL and backend performance tuning across legacy services improving throughput for high-frequency data operations.

education.school: Queens College, City University of New York
education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science
